name: Arbor Elf
oracle_text: {T}: Untap target Forest.
flavor_text:
"I thank you once more, and I bid you farewell. May your forest grow again in peace."
—Aragorn

name: Arcane Denial
oracle_text:
Counter target spell. Its controller may draw up to two cards at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep.
You draw a card at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep.
flavor_text:
"Last night I told you of Sauron, the Dark Lord. The rumors are true: he has arisen again."
—Gandalf

name: Arcane Signet
oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
flavor_text:
"Magic rings are, well, magical; and they are rare and curious."
—Gandalf

name: Commander's Sphere
oracle_text:
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.
flavor_text:
"The Ñoldor, perhaps Fëanor himself, wrought the *palantíri* in days so long ago that the time cannot be measured in years."
—Gandalf

name: Command Tower
oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
flavor_text: The Hobbits of the Westfarthing said that one could see the Sea from the top of that tower; but no Hobbit had ever been known to climb it.

name: Consider
oracle_text:
Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
Draw a card.
flavor_text:
"A new Power is rising. Against it, the old allies and policies will not avail us at all. There is one choice before us."
—Saruman

name: Crypt Incursion
oracle_text: Exile all creature cards from target player's graveyard. You gain 3 life for each card exiled this way.
flavor_text: Suddenly a song began: a cold murmur, rising and falling, grim, cold, heartless and miserable. The night was railing against the morning of which it was bereaved, and the cold was cursing the warmth for which it hungered.

name: Cultivate
oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.
flavor_text: Suddenly as they drew nearer, a terrific baying and barking broke out, and a loud voice was heard shouting: "Grip! Fang! Wolf! Come on, lads!"

name: Deep Analysis
oracle_text:
Target player draws two cards.
Flashback—{1}{U}, Pay 3 life. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
flavor_text:
"There are older and fouler things than Orcs in the deep places of the world."
—Gandalf

name: Elvish Mystic
oracle_text: {T}: Add {G}.
flavor_text:
"The Three Rings of the Elves were not made as weapons of war or conquest—that is not their power. Those who made them did not desire strength or domination or hoarded wealth, but understanding, making, and healing, to preserve all things unstained."
—Elrond

name: Elvish Visionary
oracle_text: When this creature enters, draw a card.
flavor_text:
"Do not think that only by singing amid the trees, nor even by the slender arrows of Elven- bows, is this land of Lothlórien maintained and defended against its Enemy."
—Galadriel

name: Essence Warden
oracle_text: Whenever another creature enters, you gain 1 life.
flavor_text:
"Elves seldom give unguarded advice, for advice is a dangerous gift, even from the wise to the wise."
—Gildor

name: Evolving Wilds
oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
flavor_text:
When winter first begins to bite
and stones crack in the frosty night,
when pools are black and trees are bare,
'tis evil in the Wild to fare.

name: Faithless Looting
oracle_text:
Draw two cards, then discard two cards.
Flashback {2}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
flavor_text:
"Here, lord, is Herugrim, your ancient blade. It was found in Wormtongue's room. Many other things are there which men have missed."
—Háma, to Théoden

name: Farhaven Elf
oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
flavor_text:
"The leaves were long, the grass was green,
The hemlock-umbels tall and fair,
And in the glade a light was seen
Of stars in shadow shimmering."
—*Tale of Tinúviel*

name: Farseek
oracle_text: Search your library for a Plains, Island, Swamp, or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
flavor_text:
"It's a dangerous business, Frodo, going out of your door. You step into the Road, and if you don't keep your feet, there is no knowing where you might be swept off to."
—Bilbo

name: Feed the Swarm
oracle_text: Destroy target creature or enchantment an opponent controls. You lose life equal to that permanent's mana value.
flavor_text:
"We have found many of our folk lying slain as they fled thither."
—Rider of Rohan

name: Forbidden Alchemy
oracle_text:
Look at the top four cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.
Flashback {6}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
flavor_text: Do not meddle in the affairs of Wizards, for they are subtle and quick to anger.

name: Growth Spiral
oracle_text: Draw a card. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.
flavor_text: The swift growth of the wild with briar and eglantine and trailing clematis was already drawing a veil over this place.

name: Lignify
oracle_text:
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature is a Treefolk with base power and toughness 0/4 and loses all abilities.
flavor_text:
"Huorns began to move south, as soon as the gates were shut again. Their business was with Orcs I think."
—Merry

name: Night's Whisper
oracle_text: You draw two cards and lose 2 life.
flavor_text: Frodo was hardly less terrified than his companions; he was quaking as if he was bitter cold, but his terror was swallowed up in a sudden temptation to put on the Ring.

name: Opt
oracle_text:
Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
Draw a card.
flavor_text: They looked east to the Shadow and west to the Twilight, and they plighted their troth and were glad.

name: Orchard Strider
oracle_text:
When this creature enters, create two Food tokens. (They're artifacts with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")
Basic landcycling {1}{G} ({1}{G}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

name: Path of Ancestry
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. When that mana is spent to cast a creature spell that shares a creature type with your commander, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
flavor_text: Merry gazed at the Púkel-men with wonder and pity, as they loomed up mournfully in the dusk.

name: Preordain
oracle_text: Scry 2, then draw a card. (To scry 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.)
flavor_text:
"That is the business of Wizards: Wizards are always troubled about the future."
—Treebeard

name: Pristine Talisman
oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}. You gain 1 life.
flavor_text: Each cloak was fastened about the neck with a brooch like a green leaf veined with silver.

name: Rampant Growth
oracle_text: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
flavor_text: All through the winter Sam remained as patient as he could. Spring surpassed his wildest hopes.

name: Scoured Barrens
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.
flavor_text: At length they came to Weathertop; and it was then drawing towards evening and the shadow of the hill lay dark on the road.

name: Terramorphic Expanse
oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
flavor_text: The earth groaned and quaked. The Towers of the Teeth swayed, tottered, and fell down. The mighty rampart crumbled and the Black Gate was hurled in ruin.

name: Thornwood Falls
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {G} or {U}.
flavor_text:
"To Rivendell, where Elves yet dwell
In glades beneath the misty fell."
—Merry and Pippin

name: Thought Vessel
oracle_text:
You have no maximum hand size.
{T}: Add {C}.
flavor_text:
"Grudgingly, Lord Denethor permitted me to search among his hoarded scrolls and books."
—Gandalf

name: Thrill of Possibility
oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card.
Draw two cards.
flavor_text: A hundred ladders were raised against the battlements. Over the wall and under the wall the last assault came, sweeping like a dark wave upon a hill of sand.

name: Tranquil Cove
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {W} or {U}.
flavor_text: In the South, the realm of Gondor long endured, and for a while its splendor grew, its people building high towers and havens for many ships.

name: Village Bell-Ringer
oracle_text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
When this creature enters, untap all creatures you control.
flavor_text: "The enemy is at hand! We loosed every arrow that we had, and filled the Dike with Orcs. But it will not halt them long."

name: Wayfarer's Bauble
oracle_text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
flavor_text:
All that is gold does not glitter,
Not all those who wander are lost;
The old that is strong does not wither,
Deep roots are not reached by the frost.

name: Wind-Scarred Crag
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {R} or {W}.
flavor_text:
"About that stream, on this side of the Great River, lies Rohan."
—Celeborn

name: Wood Elves
oracle_text: When this creature enters, search your library for a Forest card, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
flavor_text:
"Elves are wondrous fair to look upon, or so 'tis said."
—Faramir

name: Woodland Stream
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {G} or {U}.
flavor_text:
"There lie the woods of Lothlórien! That is the fairest of all the dwellings of my people."
—Legolas
